    @allure.story('获取广告列表')
    def test_interface_3_notice_list(self):
        """测试接口3: 获取广告列表 - notice.getList"""
        assert self.token is not None, "Token未在setup中正确提取"
    
        with allure.step("准备请求参数"):
            url = f"{self.base_url}/V0.1/index.php"
            headers = {
                "language": "zh_CN",
                "appver": "5.9.11",
                "country": "AE",
                "timeZoneName": "CST",
                "timeZoneOffset": "8",
                "content-type": "application/json",
                "token": self.token,
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {self.token}"
            }
            request_body = {
                "service": "notice.getList",
                "token": self.token,
                "xjid": self.xjid,
                "page": 1
            }
    
        with allure.step("发送请求"):
            response = requests.post(url, json=request_body, headers=headers)
            print(f"[DEBUG] 接口响应状态码: {response.status_code}")
            print(f"[DEBUG] 接口响应头: {response.headers}")
            print(f"[DEBUG] 接口响应体: {response.text}")
            try:
                print(f"[DEBUG] 接口响应JSON: {response.json()}")
            except Exception:
                print(f"[DEBUG] 响应不是JSON格式")
